About Me
The Story

Dynamic Content Creator and Media Specialist with 7+ years of experience turning pixels into storytelling gold. Whether it's editing videos till 3 AM, shooting crispy cinematic b-roll with a smartphone, or making reels that stop the scroll — done with passion and precision.

Founder of Hey Its Tech — home to high-retention smartphone reviews, spicy gaming tests, in-depth chipset analysis and camera breakdowns. Content across YouTube, TikTok, Facebook, Instagram and X, keeping the algorithm fed consistently.

Full pipeline managed completely solo. CEO by title, but also the camera guy, editor, thumbnail designer, scriptwriter and the guy who occasionally reminds himself that sleep is important.

Fluent in Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, After Effects, CapCut Pro, Filmora 14/15 and Lightroom. Scripts written in English and Urdu with strong keyword placement and retention-first structure.

Scripts
Script Samples

Retention-first, SEO-optimized, humor-infused. Click any script to read the full opening.

SCRIPT_01
Google Pixel 7 Pro Review
OK friends, let's be honest — 2025 is shaping up to be the most confusing year for smartphone buyers. Finding a Pixel 7 Pro for $250 feels like finding a PS5 at a garage sale...
📱 Smartphone Review
SCRIPT_02
Google Pixel 8 Review
Friends, I've never seen a $250 smartphone this good. Imagine getting the features of a $1100 smartphone for just $250 — sounds too good to be true, right? Well, meet the Google Pixel 8...
📱 Value Pick
SCRIPT_03
Google Pixel 8 Pro Review
Alright, let's talk about the brainiest smartphone of 2025 — the Google Pixel 8 Pro. When I say brainy, I mean this thing could probably pass the CCIE... if it had fingers and a LinkedIn profile.
📱 Flagship Review
SCRIPT_04
Tecno Camon 30 Review
So when you hear the name "Tecno," you might think of a slow, unattractive, expensive smartphone. And as you know, I was expecting the same. But then I bought the Tecno Camon 30, and damn... WOW.
📱 Budget Review
SCRIPT_05
Vivo V60 5G Review
Every time Vivo drops a new V-series smartphone, people instantly ask me: "Is this one actually worth it, or is it just another pretty face?" This time things are different. A 3x ZEISS periscope lens on a mid-ranger? That's bold.
📱 Mid-Range
SCRIPT_06
Xiaomi 12T Pro Camera Review
This right here is a budget photographer's dream. 8K video recording, a 200MP camera, portraits that look like you hired a DSLR — sounds like a $1000 flagship. Wrong. This thing costs only $150.
📷 Camera Review

Workflow
My Process

Every Hey Its Tech video follows this 7-step solo production workflow — from idea to 5 platforms.

01
Research
Topic selection, competitor analysis, keyword research and full SEO planning before any camera gets switched on.
02
Scripting
Full retention-first script — strong hook, clear flow, humor throughout, strong CTA. Written in English or Urdu per audience.
03
Filming
A-roll talking head and B-roll product shots on DSLR and/or smartphone. Cinematic framing, natural lighting every shoot.
04
Editing
Full post-production in Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve or Filmora. Color grade, audio mix, motion graphics, retention pacing.
05
Thumbnail
Click-optimized thumbnail — bold typography, high contrast, clean composition. Designed in Canva/Photoshop. A/B tested.
06
SEO & Upload
Title, description, tags, chapters and hashtags fully optimized. Premier scheduling for peak posting times.
07
Cross-Post
Content adapted for TikTok, Reels and Facebook with platform-native captions, hooks and formats per platform.
